Octopus Observations

See the global range of octopus species

This data visualization shows octopus observations since 2000. Each species is shown in a unique color, and each dot represents a documented octopus observation in the Global Biodiversity Information Facility (GBIF). Click on a dot to see the species name and use the slider below to explore when and where each species has been seen.

Global Biodiversity Information Facility. GBIF.org (20 January 2025) GBIF Occurrence Download https://doi.org/10.15468/dl.v9ctjg

Select Year

2014
2000 2024
Loading observations...

Species Legend

Next: Mosquitoes →

Background

Resilience Continuum is a project by Claire Nyquist which explores science through data visualization. I'm excited about the combination of the apparently disparate fields of design and public health as they come together in data visualization.

Contact

For inquiries or collaboration opportunities:
